headline: Top 3 Dividend Aristocrat Stocks to Buy for Strong Returns in 2026
summary: Volatility is again picking up, and it’s a good idea to focus more on safety. There’s no better way to do so than to buy Dividend Aristocrat stocks like Exxon Mobil (NYSE:XOM), PepsiCo (NASDAQ:PEP), and Johnson & Johnson (NYSE:JNJ). headline: Bayer Q4 Earnings Match Estimates, Xarelto and Eylea Pull Down Sales

headline: Johnson And Johnson Balances Nipocalimab Progress With Bayer Legal Challenge
summary: Johnson & Johnson (NYSE:JNJ) received FDA Fast Track designation for nipocalimab as a potential treatment for systemic lupus erythematosus, supported by positive Phase 2 data and the start of a Phase 3 trial. The company is advancing several other drug candidates across its pharmaceutical portfolio, underscoring an active research and development agenda. Bayer initiated legal action against Johnson & Johnson over product claims related to the prostate cancer market, raising questions around...
